author: LoBreeze
name: PR1471 Hessian Half-Group Clip Negative Result
blurb: Non-record full 8xH100 result on the PR1471 SP8192 no-TTT stack. A conservative Hessian-aware/group SDClip variant completed under the 10-minute training cap and 16MB artifact cap, but regressed versus the PR1471 public same-lineage reference. This documents that the tested row/group Hessian modulation did not transfer at full scale.
technique_summary: PR1471 SP8192 + SDClip + 3-layer recurrence + no TTT, with HESSIAN_CLIP_LAMBDA=0.0875 and conservative group clip multipliers early=1.03, loop=1.015, mid=1.0, late=0.985. The result stayed legal but regressed by +0.00843234 BPB versus the PR1471 same-lineage public reference.
